---
title: "Helpful Links"
---

Here is where we list several helpful links for Texas State University resources.

## Employer information

### [Institutional financial fact sheet (Division of Research)](https://www.research.txst.edu/osp/pre-award-support/preparing-a-proposal/fact-sheet.html){target="_blank"}

-   EIN number
-   Tax exempt status

<div style="text-align: center;">
{{< downloadthis resources/txst_financial_factsheet_06_20_24.pdf dname="txst_financial_factsheet" label="Download fact sheet"  type="primary">}}
</div>

### Tax exempt status (IRS letters)

<div style="text-align: center;">
{{< downloadthis resources/irs_letters.zip dname="txst_irs_letters" label="Download IRS Letters"  type="primary">}}
</div>

## Employee information

### [SAP portal](https://www.txst.edu/sap.html){target="_blank"}

-   Time sheets
-   Success Factors (in-service training)
-   W2

### Travel Requests

### Concur

### [Parking Services](https://txstate.aimsparking.com/){target="_blank"}

-   Purchase parking permits
-   Pay parking tickets

## Research

### [KUALI](https://www.research.txst.edu/rrss/online-services.html){target="_blank"}

### [Data Management](https://www.research.txst.edu/resources/data-mgmt.html){target="_blank"}
